item.description: Hi! I am Ana Ezquerro 👋. 💻: I am a Master Student at University of A Coruña and a part-time researcher in the LyS Group. 👩‍🎓: Recently graduated in Data Science and Engineering (2019-2023) and currently enrolled in the first year of the Master in Artificial Intelligence. 🚀: Work & interests: Natural Language Processing, Audio Signal Processing, Multimodal Learning, Reinforcement Learning, Recommender Systems. 🌱: Python as main programming language with proficiency level in Julia, R & SQL and advanced level in Java.

Honors 📜. 2019. Best Academic Records for the University Test Access in Galicia offered by the University of Santiago de Compostela. 2022. Department Collaboration Scholarship offered by the University of A Coruña and Banco Santander. 2022. Awards for Academic Excellence in Bachelor’s Degrees 2020-21 offered by Xunta de Galicia. 2023. Awards for Academic Excellence in Bachelor’s Degrees 2021-22 offered by Xunta de Galicia.

Research ✒️. Ana Ezquerro, Germán Aneiros-Pérez, Manuel Oviedo. Automatic covariates selection in dynamic regression models with application to COVID-19 evolution. In The 5th XoveTIC Conference (XoveTIC 2022) organized by the Centre for ICT Research with the University of A Coruña. Ana Ezquerro, Brais Cancela, Ana López-Cheda. On the Reliability of Machine Learning Models for Survival Analysis When Cure Is a Possibility. In Mathematics 2023, Vol. 11, Nonparametric Statistical Methods and their Applications.

Education 📚. 2014-2015: Piano Professional Degree at Xan Viaño Professional Conservatory of Music. 2019-2023: Data Science and Engineering Degree at University of A Coruña. Honor distinction in the Final Degree Project: “Fully Incremental Parsing based on Neural Networks”. 2023-Present: Master in Artificial Intelligence at University of A Coruña. Experience 💻. 07/2021-09/2021 (full-time): Research Assistant at CITIC. Analysis and comparison of cure models against ML techniques in COVID19 data for UCI admission prediction.
